Series Description: Mystic laboratory and potion-themed dragons with brass apparatus, spellbooks, elixirs, alchemical tools, cauldrons, and arcane study props.
Celtic knotwork dragon emblems with interlaced bodies, jewel-tone palettes, white linework, and decorative knot motifs.
Gemstone and crystal dragons with mineral bodies, geodes, luminous facets, ice-like formations, and saturated jewel colors.
Cute baby/helper dragons with file, folder, media, utility, cloud, message, book, heart, and tool-themed poses.
Futuristic cybernetic dragons with glowing circuitry, holographic effects, tech armor, neon energy, and sci-fi UI motifs.
Elemental fantasy dragons covering fire, ice, forest, storm, shadow, gold, bone, water, lava, and armored variants.
Old-fantasy engraved or woodcut dragons with monochrome ink linework, limited color accents, and classic mythical poses.
Etched sketch-style dragons with environmental vignettes such as caves, treasure, storms, moonlight, swamp, lava, ice, and bone.
Polished heraldic crest dragons with shields, banners, jewel accents, moon/sun symbols, and noble fantasy emblem framing.
Ink-brush Japanese-style serpentine dragons with cloud, wave, red sun, seal stamp, and sumi-e inspired forms.
Map-and-sea inspired dragons with compass roses, waves, scrollwork, clouds, old chart ornamentation, and maritime fantasy styling.
Norse/Nordic dragons with rune circles, frost, knotwork, ice, aurora accents, shields, wolves, and cold mythic decoration.
Ornate gold-line decorative dragons with jewel-tone palettes, stars, vines, roses, clouds, ice, treasure, sun, and moon motifs.
Scholar and librarian dragons with books, scrolls, globes, maps, robes, glasses, candles, and study-desk props.
Stained-glass dragons with leaded panel linework, luminous gemlike color blocking, cathedral-window styling, and bright fantasy palettes.
Steampunk dragons with brass, copper, gears, goggles, boilers, gauges, pipes, locomotives, tools, and mechanical props.
Tarot-card and occult fantasy dragon designs with oval frames, crowns, swords, chalices, stars, flames, moons, crystals, and mystical symbols.
Stone statue and gargoyle-style dragons with marble, moss, carved rock, temple, rune, gothic, crystal, fossil, and cliff variants.
